summary: Completed iteration 4 testing for Anima Fund - Complete overhaul. All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: 4 sections (Infrastructure, Capabilities, Deploy, Communicate), 8 status chips including Engine, Deploy Agent button visible in Deploy section with Phase 0 description, phase state display NOT shown (correct without sandbox/engine), agent logs viewer NOT shown (correct without engine). All new endpoints (deploy-agent, agent-logs, phase-state) fail gracefully without sandbox. Genesis prompt verified with 4-phase system and 10 functional tool tests. System-prompt.ts verified with loadPhaseState function and Layer 5.6 phase enforcement. Security verified: no conway-terminal or openclaw installed on host.
critical_code_review_comments: Security verified: No conway-terminal or openclaw installed on host system
New endpoints deploy-agent, agent-logs, phase-state all fail gracefully with 'No sandbox' error
Genesis prompt has complete 4-phase system with Phase 0 (tool testing), Phase 1 ($5k), Phase 2 ($10k), Phase 3 (create fund)
Genesis prompt has 10 specific functional tool tests (curl, git, node, python3, telegram, conway terminal, sandbox, domains, compute, port exposure)
system-prompt.ts has loadPhaseState function that reads ~/.anima/phase-state.json
system-prompt.ts has Layer 5.6 PHASE ENFORCEMENT block with phase-specific rules and FORBIDDEN actions
Status endpoint returns all expected fields including tools dict for engine status
8 status chips displayed: VM, Terminal, OpenClaw, Compute, Ports, Skills, Engine, Credits
seed_data_creation: Test nudges sent via API verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 adds major changes: Deploy Agent endpoint (pushes engine + config into sandbox), agent-logs endpoint (reads from sandbox), phase-state endpoint (tracks Phase 0/1/2/3). Genesis prompt completely rewritten with 4-phase mandatory system and 10 functional tool tests. system-prompt.ts now has loadPhaseState() and Layer 5.6 phase enforcement. All sandbox-dependent endpoints gracefully fail with 'No sandbox'. Conway has 0 credits so sandbox creation will fail. Frontend has 4 sections (Infrastructure, Capabilities, Deploy, Communicate) and 8 status chips including Engine.

new_backend_apis: POST /api/provision/deploy-agent - fails gracefully with 'No sandbox. Create one first.'
GET /api/provision/phase-state - returns error 'No sandbox and no local phase state'
existing_backend_apis: GET /api/provision/status - returns all fields including tools dict for engine
frontend_ui: 4 sections: Infrastructure (3 items), Capabilities (3 items), Deploy (2 items), Communicate (1 item)
8 status chips: VM (none), Terminal (no), OpenClaw (no), Compute (no), Ports (0), Skills (no), Engine (no), Credits ($0.00)
Deploy Agent button visible in Deploy section with description 'Push engine + config into sandbox, start agent (born in Phase 0)'
Phase state display NOT shown (correct - no phase data without sandbox/engine)
Agent logs viewer NOT shown (correct - no engine deployed)
Custom nudge input and Send button present
genesis_prompt_content: 4-phase system: Phase 0 (Tool Testing), Phase 1 (Earn $5,000), Phase 2 (Earn $10,000), Phase 3 (Create Fund)
10 functional tool tests: curl, git, node, python3, telegram, conway terminal, sandbox, domains, compute, port exposure
system_prompt_content: Layer 5.6 PHASE ENFORCEMENT block with phase-specific rules
Phase 0 FORBIDDEN actions: create_goal, spawn_child, domain_register
Phase 1 rules: 1-hour deadline, no building products, only revenue activities
security_checks: No conway-terminal installed on host (which conway-terminal returns nothing)
No openclaw installed on host (which openclaw returns nothing)
